title: Sessions
text:
Last updated: 2026-07-24 03:00:42
The dataset contains 23 unique participants with 47 in-person sessions and 4 Zoom sessions.
9 participants have 3 complete in-person sessions.
4 participants have 4 complete sessions.
15 participants have complete 7 and 9 month sessions.
9 participants have complete 9 and 11 month sessions.
4 participants have complete 11 and 13 month sessions.

✔ Complete, ✖ Pending, ❌ Missing/Unsure

title: Summaries
text:
Last updated: 2026-07-24 03:02:36 using pinned data version from: 2026-07-23 00:51:25
Users can load data by running (requires one-time google drive authentication):

Codelibrary(tidyverse)
library(pins)
library(nanoparquet)
library(googledrive)

# Load the board of pinned data sets (authenticated users only)
board <- board_gdrive(path = as_id("1OZlphhu6vYm1A2Bm2-zD7a4luS5nGWgS")) 

# To see available pinned data
board %>% pin_list()

# To read the raw IMU predictions throughout the day
ds <- board %>% pin_read("imu_raw_samples") %>%
  filter(nap_period == 0, exclude_period == 0)

# To read REDCap data (AIMS, Demographics, caregiver surveys, motor milestones)
redcap <- board %>% pin_read("redcap_data")

# To read the hourly EMA REDCap data
ema <- board %>% pin_read("ema")

# To read sleep and target-child-directed speech predictions from LENA
sleep_tcds <- board %>% pin_read("sleep_tcds")


Usable data

Codeusable_data <- ds %>% count(id, session) %>% mutate(usable_hours = n/3600)
recording_duration <- ds %>% group_by(id, session) %>% 
  mutate(recording_hours = as.numeric(max(time) - min(time))) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 1) %>% ungroup
  
usable_data %>% left_join(recording_duration) %>% 
  get_summary_stats(usable_hours, recording_hours, show = c("mean", "sd","min","max")) %>% 
  flextable() %>% autofit()

Codeusable_data  %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = usable_hours)) + 
  geom_histogram() + 
  scale_x_binned(name = "Hours", limits = c(2,14))
recording_duration  %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = recording_hours)) + 
  geom_histogram() + 
  scale_x_binned(name = "Hours", limits = c(2,14))





Usable hours after exclusions





Recording length in hours




Infant Position Frequency by Age (Overall)

Codeds_sum <- ds %>% group_by(id, session) %>% 
  mutate(total_samples = n()) %>% group_by(id, session, pos) %>% 
  summarize(pos_n  = n(), total_samples = mean(total_samples)) %>% ungroup
ds_sum <- ds_sum %>% complete(nesting(id, session), pos, fill = list(pos_n = 0, total_samples = 1))
ds_sum$pos_prop = ds_sum$pos_n/ds_sum$total_samples*100
ds_sum$session = as.numeric(ds_sum$session)

ds_sum %>% group_by(pos, session) %>% 
  get_summary_stats(pos_prop, show = c("mean", "sd","min","max")) %>% 
  select(-variable) %>% flextable() %>% autofit()

Codeggplot(ds_sum, aes(x = session, y = pos_prop, color = pos)) + 
  stat_summary(position = position_dodge(.1)) + 
  stat_summary(geom = "line", position = position_dodge(.1)) + 
  ylim(0,101) + ylab("% of time") + xlab("Session") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("7 mo","9 mo","11 mo"), limits = c(0.5,3.5)) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = pal, name ="") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggplot(ds_sum, aes(x = session, y = pos_prop, fill = pos)) + 
  stat_summary(geom = "bar", position = "stack") + 
  ylim(0,101) + ylab("% of time") + xlab("Session") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("7 mo","9 mo","11 mo"), limits = c(0.5,3.5)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal, name ="") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")





Position means and SE





Position distribution




Infant Position Frequency by Age (Individual)

Codeggplot(ds_sum, aes(x = session, y = pos_prop, color = pos, group = id)) + 
  facet_wrap(~ pos) + 
  geom_point() + geom_line() +  
  ylim(0,100) + ylab("% of time") + xlab("Session") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("7 mo","9 mo","11 mo"), limits = c(0.5,3.5)) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = pal, name ="") + 
  theme(legend.position = "none")







Infant Restraint Frequency by Age (Overall)

Codeds_sum_restraint <- ds %>% group_by(id, session) %>% 
  mutate(total_samples = n()) %>% group_by(id, session, restraint) %>% 
  summarize(restraint_n  = n(), total_samples = mean(total_samples)) %>% ungroup
ds_sum_restraint <- ds_sum_restraint %>% complete(nesting(id, session), restraint, fill = list(restraint_n = 0, total_samples = 1))
ds_sum_restraint$restraint_prop = ds_sum_restraint$restraint_n/ds_sum_restraint$total_samples*100
ds_sum_restraint$session = as.numeric(ds_sum_restraint$session)

ds_sum_restraint %>% group_by(restraint, session) %>% 
  get_summary_stats(restraint_prop, show = c("mean", "sd","min","max")) %>% 
  select(-variable) %>% flextable() %>% autofit()

  scale_color_manual(values = restraint_pal, name ="") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  stat_summary(geom = "bar", position = "stack") + 
  ylim(0,101) + ylab("% of time") + xlab("Session") +

  scale_fill_manual(values = restraint_pal, name ="") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

Infant Restraint Frequency by Age (Individual)

Codeggplot(ds_sum_restraint, aes(x = session, y = restraint_prop, color = restraint, group = id)) + 
  facet_wrap(~ restraint) + 
  geom_point() + geom_line() +  
  ylim(0,100) + ylab("% of time") + xlab("Session") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("7 mo","9 mo","11 mo"), limits = c(0.5,3.5)) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = restraint_pal, name ="") + 
  theme(legend.position = "none")







Posture by Restraint

Codeds_sum_posrest <- ds %>% group_by(id, session) %>% 
  mutate(total_samples = n()) %>% group_by(id, session, pos, restraint) %>% 
  summarize(posrest_n  = n()) %>% ungroup
ds_sum_posrest <- ds_sum_posrest %>% complete(nesting(id, session), restraint, pos, fill = list(posrest_n = 0))
ds_sum_posrest <- ds_sum_posrest %>% group_by(id, session) %>% 
  mutate(total_samples = sum(posrest_n)) %>% ungroup
ds_sum_posrest$prop = ds_sum_posrest$posrest_n/ds_sum_posrest$total_samples*100
ds_sum_posrest$session = as.numeric(ds_sum_posrest$session)

ggplot(ds_sum_posrest, aes(x = session, y = prop, color = pos)) + 
  stat_summary(position = position_dodge(.1)) + 
  stat_summary(geom = "line", position = position_dodge(.1)) + 
  facet_wrap(~ restraint) + 
  ylab("% of time") + xlab("Session") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("7 mo","9 mo","11 mo"), limits = c(0.5,3.5)) + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,55)) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = pal, name ="") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")







Infant AIMS by Session

Coderedcap %>% group_by(session) %>% 
  get_summary_stats(aims_supine_total, aims_prone_total, aims_sitting_total, aims_standing_total, aims_totalscore, show = c("mean", "sd","min","max")) %>% arrange(variable, session) %>% 
  flextable() %>% autofit()

Codeaims_long <- redcap %>% rename(aims_total_score = aims_totalscore) %>% pivot_longer(cols = c("aims_supine_total", "aims_prone_total", "aims_sitting_total", "aims_standing_total", "aims_total_score"),
                        names_to = "Scale", values_to = "Score", names_pattern = "^[^_]+_([^_]+)_[^_]+$") %>% 
  mutate(Total = ifelse(Scale == "total", "Total", "Subscale"))

ggplot(aims_long, aes(x = session, y = Score, color = Scale, group = Scale)) + 
  facet_wrap(~ Total, scales = "free_y" ) + 
  stat_summary(position = position_dodge(.1)) + 
  stat_summary(geom = "line", position = position_dodge(.1)) + 
  ylab("Score") + xlab("Session") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:4, labels = c("7 mo","9 mo","11 mo","13 mo")) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")



AIMS scores by age



Infant Position by AIMS
Codeds_sum_aims <- left_join(ds_sum, redcap)

ds_sum_aims %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = aims_supine_total, y = pos_prop)) + 
  facet_wrap(~pos) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, shape = 21) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) + 
  ylab("% of awake time") + xlab("AIMS Supine") + ylim(0,100)
ds_sum_aims %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = aims_prone_total, y = pos_prop)) + 
  facet_wrap(~pos) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, shape = 21) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) + 
  ylab("% of awake time") + xlab("AIMS Prone") + ylim(0,100)
ds_sum_aims %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = aims_sitting_total, y = pos_prop)) + 
  facet_wrap(~pos) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, shape = 21) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) + 
  ylab("% of awake time") + xlab("AIMS Sitting") + ylim(0,100)
ds_sum_aims %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = aims_standing_total, y = pos_prop)) + 
  facet_wrap(~pos) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, shape = 21) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) + 
  ylab("% of awake time") + xlab("AIMS Standing") + ylim(0,100)
ds_sum_aims %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = aims_totalscore, y = pos_prop)) + 
  facet_wrap(~pos) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, shape = 21) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) + 
  ylab("% of awake time") + xlab("AIMS Total Score") + ylim(0,100)

ds_sum_posrest_aims %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = aims_supine_total, y = prop)) + 
  facet_grid(restraint ~ pos) +

ggplot(aes(x = aims_prone_total, y = prop)) +
